case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 302, MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE,ETC, CALENDAR OF OCT-06-1998, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.
